hero.slide1Desc: Diagnostics, engine repair, and preventive servicing for heavy trucks
hero.slide2Desc: Maintenance for construction machinery used in large-scale projects
hero.slide3Desc: On-site maintenance and emergency repairs anywhere in Algeria

about.title: NASMO
about.description: NASMO is a specialized maintenance company with more than 10 years of experience in servicing heavy trucks, construction engines, and industrial machinery.
about.description2: Our company works with major construction and infrastructure companies such as GCB and Cosider, providing reliable maintenance services for their fleets and equipment.
about.service1: Truck maintenance: diagnostics, engine repair, and preventive servicing
about.service2: Construction equipment: maintenance for heavy machinery on large-scale projects
about.service3: Mobile service: on-site maintenance and emergency repairs across Algeria
about.expertise: Our team of experienced technicians ensures high-quality repairs, preventive maintenance, and rapid intervention when equipment failures occur. We are committed to reliability, professionalism, and long-term partnerships with our clients.
about.coverage: NASMO's mobile technical teams can travel anywhere in Algeria to perform maintenance directly on your site.
about.devDesc: We are committed to keeping Algeria's heavy machinery running with professional, dependable maintenance services.
about.qualityDesc: Our commitment to quality and professionalism allows us to maintain the highest industry standards in heavy equipment maintenance.

services.title: What We Do
services.subtitle: NASMO provides professional maintenance services for trucks, construction engines, and industrial vehicles

equipment.title: Mobile Service
equipment.desc: Our mobile technical teams travel anywhere in Algeria to perform maintenance directly on your site, minimizing downtime.
